<!--
Thanks for contributing to Origami! Please fill this out so reviewers can
understand the change quickly. See CONTRIBUTING.md for the patch workflow.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New Origami code (new files under `io.papermc.origami`)
- [ ] Patch to existing Paper / CraftBukkit file (`paper-patches/`)
- [ ] Patch to `net.minecraft` internals (`minecraft-patches/`)
- [ ] Build / CI / docs only
- [ ] Rebase onto a newer Paper (`paperRef` bump)

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `./gradlew applyAllPatches` and it applied cleanly
- [ ] I ran `./gradlew rebuildPatches` and committed the regenerated patch files
- [ ] I ran `./gradlew build` locally (or expect CI to verify)
- [ ] Patches each represent one logical change with a descriptive `Subject:` line

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything tricky, follow-ups, or things you're unsure about. -->
